markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content, performance, and the transition to Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Shift from direct LLM hosting topics (not a Blaxel feature) to adjacent use cases, positioning Blaxel as the platform for running code *generated by* hosted models.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [**Performance:** Early results are strong, with new content ranking on page 1–2 and a "CodeSandbox alternative" post already cited \>50 times by LLMs, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Phase 2 Transition:** The engagement moves to Phase 2 next week, with a new Engagement Manager taking over to ensure long-term performance and success.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [**Process Refinement:** Use Google Docs for all content feedback to ensure immediate email notifications; Blaxel will provide audio recordings or sales call transcripts to add unique, visionary insights.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

## Topics

### Content Feedback & Strategy

  - [**Comparison Articles (Moto, Daytona):**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Required significant revisions for accuracy (e.g., pricing) and editorial tone.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Now considered high-quality and nearly ready for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Will serve as a baseline for the content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**LLM Hosting Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [**Problem:** The content incorrectly positioned Blaxel as an LLM hosting provider, which is not a current feature.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [**New Strategy:** Reposition Blaxel for *adjacent* use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
          - [**Positioning:** Blaxel is the platform for running code *generated by* hosted LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
          - [**Goal:** Build awareness within the model hosting community.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Visionary Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Request:** Paul requested more high-level, visionary content (e.g., "AI infrastructure in 5 years").](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Solution:** Blaxel will provide unique insights via audio recordings or sales call transcripts, as AI alone cannot generate novel ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**Writing Guidelines:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [Updated to simplify voice and sentence structure based on Vikram's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [Blaxel will review new drafts to confirm the change is effective.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

### Performance & Impact

  - [**Organic Search:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Looker dashboard shows strong early results, on par with other GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [New content ranks on page 1–2, a positive signal of topic relevance and authority.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility (Check That):**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [The new Check That tool confirms content is being cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [**Example:** The "CodeSandbox alternative" post has been cited \>50 times.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [**Significance:** This validates the content strategy's long-term impact on AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

### Process & Workflow

  - [**Feedback Channel:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
      - [**Decision:** Use Google Docs for all content feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures immediate email notifications and avoids context-switching between tools.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [**Author Attribution:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - [**Decision:** Continue using real author names.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Real authors with social media presence provide a stronger authority signal for SEO than generic personas.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [**Artifact Maintenance:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
      - [The AI pipeline's "artifacts" (knowledge base) are updated based on feedback and product changes.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
      - [**New Step:** A product messaging accuracy check will be added to the workflow to reduce revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
      - [**Process:** Blaxel will share product change logs via Slack to keep artifacts current.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)

### Phase 2 Transition

  - [**Timeline:** The 10-week initial phase concludes next week.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [**Transition:** A new Engagement Manager will join the weekly calls to manage the long-term relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [**Continuity:** The content pipeline and weekly meeting cadence will remain unchanged.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)

### Future Growth Initiatives

  - [**Programmatic Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [GrowthX proposed programmatic content (e.g., templates, calculators) to drive qualified traffic at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Blaxel's Concern:** Programmatic content that generates code could be high-maintenance.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Blaxel is open to exploring independent side products (like Ramp's calculator library) that are not tightly coupled to the core product.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Paid Ads:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [Blaxel asked how to articulate blog content with new paid ad campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**GrowthX's Role:** Use non-branded ad keywords for topic research to build a compounding organic foundation that supports paid efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [Grant Blaxel team access to the Looker performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [Send Paul a Slack DM to schedule an in-person coffee meeting in SF.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
  - [**Nicolas:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
      - [Use Google Docs for all future content feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
      - [Share sales call transcripts with GrowthX to inform visionary content.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [**Blaxel Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
      - [Share product change logs via Slack to keep content artifacts current.](https://fathom.video/share/_GsHVF-oADG6p6g6xGv3wHo8zVTigSQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
